text: vv. 8, 9: Jannes and Mambres (or, according to some manuscripts, Jambres) were the names given by Hebrew tradition to the magicians who withstood Moses by means of enchantments (Ex. 7.11), and were finally discomfited (Ex. 9.11).
‘Holy learning’, including, doubtless, the Old Testament scriptures, but not necessarily confined to them.
